admin.title: Admin
admin.description: Super admin panel — manage users, organizations, and system health.

users.title: Users
users.description: Browse, search, and impersonate any user across all organizations.

organizations.title: Organizations
organizations.description: All workspaces in the system, ranked by recency.

impersonate.confirm: Impersonate {label}? You will see the app as this user until you stop.

onboarding.title: Set up your workspace
onboarding.subtitle: Three quick steps and you're ready to ship.

plan.title: Pick a plan
plan.description: Start free or unlock more capacity. You can change plans any time.

profile.title: Profile
profile.emailHint: We will send a verification link to confirm a new email address.
profile.subtitle: Your identity and contact information.

avatar.title: Avatar
avatar.description: Upload a square image (PNG, JPEG, or WebP, max 2MB).
avatar.fileTooBig: File is too large. Maximum size is 2MB.
avatar.invalidType: Unsupported image type. Use PNG, JPEG, or WebP.

export.title: Export my data
export.description: Download a copy of every record we hold for your account, including profile, organizations, audit events, notifications, and invitations.
export.compliance: Required by GDPR Article 20 (Right to data portability) and PIPL Article 45 (Right to obtain a copy of personal information).
export.error: Failed to prepare your export. Please try again.

emailChange.title: Change email address
emailChange.description: We will send a verification link to the new address. The change only takes effect once you confirm it from that inbox.
emailChange.verificationSent: Check your inbox at {email} to confirm the change.

confirm.successDescription: Your sign-in email has been updated.
confirm.failureDescription: This verification link is invalid, expired, or already used. Please request a new one from your account settings.

account.title: Account
account.tip: Press {key} anywhere to reopen this dialog.

empty.title: No history yet
empty.description: Charges and invoices will appear here after your first paid period.

personalization.title: Personalization
personalization.subtitle: Tell Sailor who you are and how to respond.

impact.hero_subtitle: Let there be no difficult business in the world.
impact.social_description: Empowering edge innovators. Breaking traditional filters and empowering solo founders with out-of-the-box infrastructure.
impact.governance_description: Algorithmic governance built on Proof of Work and real business results, replacing opaque bureaucracy.
impact.environment_description: Driving cloud footprint reduction via extreme SaaS integration and resource efficiency.

security.title: Security
security.description: Manage your password, multi-factor authentication, and active sessions.
security.managedByProvider: Security settings are managed by your authentication provider.

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.description: Use a strong password you don't reuse on other sites.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.description: Add a second verification step using an authenticator app.
twoFactor.enabledHelp: Your account asks for a 6-digit authenticator code after password sign-in.
twoFactor.disabledHelp: Protect your account with a 6-digit code from an authenticator app.
twoFactor.scanQrCode: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code below.
twoFactor.backupCodesDescription: Save these codes somewhere safe. Each can be used once if you lose access to your authenticator.

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.description: Devices and browsers currently signed in to your account.
sessions.revokeAll: Sign out of all other devices

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.description: Permanently remove your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone.

connectedAccounts.title: Connected accounts
connectedAccounts.description: Review OAuth sign-in methods linked to your Nebutra identity.
connectedAccounts.help: Keep at least one trusted sign-in method available before unlinking a provider.

passkeys.title: Passkeys
passkeys.description: Use device-bound credentials for phishing-resistant sign-in.
passkeys.cancelled: Passkey setup was cancelled. Nothing changed.
passkeys.nameHelp: Give this passkey a recognizable name before your browser asks for confirmation.

setPassword.title: Set a password
setPassword.description: Add a password to sign in without your OAuth provider.
setPassword.sentMessage: We've sent a password setup link to your email.

banner.slogan: Ship your Startup, governed from day one.
banner.tagline: Multi-region agents, multi-tenant by default. No platform team required.

signIn.title: Log in to Nebutra
signIn.subtitle: Choose how you want to sign in.
signIn.useMagicLink: Send me a magic link instead
signIn.passkeyDescription: Use Face ID, Touch ID, or your security key. No password needed.
signIn.passkeyUnsupported: This browser does not support passkeys.
signIn.passkeyError: Passkey sign-in failed. Try another method.
signIn.genericError: An error occurred. Please try again.
signIn.captchaError: Bot verification failed. Refresh the page and try again.

passkeys.title: Passkeys
passkeys.description: Use Face ID, Touch ID, Windows Hello, or a security key instead of a password. Each device has its own passkey.
passkeys.registerUnsupported: This browser does not support passkeys.
passkeys.revokeConfirm: Remove this passkey? You won't be able to sign in with it anymore.

magicLink.title: Sign in with a magic link
magicLink.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a 6-digit code to sign in.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we will send a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.success: If that email is registered, you'll receive a reset link shortly.

resetPassword.title: Reset your password
resetPassword.description: Choose a new password for your account.
resetPassword.successDescription: You can now sign in with your new password.
resetPassword.invalidDescription: This password reset link is missing or malformed. Request a new one from the forgot-password page.

verifyEmail.successDescription: Your email address has been verified.
verifyEmail.failureDescription: We could not verify your email with that link.

loginSuccess.title: You're signed in
loginSuccess.description: Your session is ready. We are opening the Nebutra workspace and preserving the secure handoff from the authentication flow.

errors.userNotFound: No account found with that email.
errors.userAlreadyExists: An account with that email already exists.
errors.weakPassword: Password is too weak. Use at least 8 characters with mixed case and numbers.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.samePassword: New password must be different from your current password.
errors.emailNotVerified: Please verify your email address first.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.invalidVerificationCode: Verification code is incorrect or expired.
errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
errors.rateLimited: You're doing that too often. Slow down.
errors.providerNotSupported: This action is managed by your authentication provider.
errors.networkError: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

suggestions.title: Try one of these to get started

activity.title: Show recent activity
activity.prompt: Show me the most recent activity across my workspace from the past 24 hours.

debug.title: Debug an error
debug.prompt: Help me debug a runtime error. I will paste the stack trace and you can guide me through it.

email.title: Draft a summary email
email.prompt: Draft a concise weekly summary email I can send to my team about platform progress.

features.title: Explore platform features
features.prompt: Walk me through the key features of this SaaS platform and how I can use them.

activePlan.title: Active plan
activePlan.noPlanDescription: Pick a plan to unlock paid features and higher usage limits.

errors.loadFailed: Could not load your billing status.

logo.title: Organization logo
logo.description: Upload a square image (PNG, JPEG, or WebP, max 2MB) to represent your organization.
logo.fileTooBig: File is too large. Maximum size is 2MB.
logo.invalidType: Unsupported image type. Use PNG, JPEG, or WebP.

name.title: Organization name
name.description: Update the display name shown to your team and customers.
name.label: Name

delete.title: Delete organization
delete.description: Permanently remove this organization, all members, invitations, and associated data. This action cannot be undone.
delete.confirmLabel: Type the organization name to confirm

invitation.title: You've been invited
invitation.heading: You've been invited to join {organizationName}
invitation.description: Accept the invitation to start collaborating with the team.
invitation.errorEmailMismatch: This invitation was sent to a different email
invitation.errorEmailMismatchDetail: Sign in with the email address that received the invitation to accept it.
invitation.errorExpiredDetail: Ask the inviter to send a new invitation.
invitation.errorNotFoundDetail: The invitation link is invalid or has been revoked.
invitation.errorNotAvailableDetail: This invitation has already been responded to and is no longer active.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.description: Generate and manage API keys for programmatic access to Nebutra.
apiKeys.noPermission: You do not have permission to view API keys.

dialog.title: Create API key
dialog.description: API keys let external systems talk to Nebutra on your behalf. Treat them like passwords.
dialog.successWarning: This key will not be shown again — copy it now and store it somewhere safe.
dialog.confirmClose: Are you sure? Closing this dialog will hide the key forever — make sure you have copied it.

auditLog.title: Audit Log
auditLog.description: Track every administrative action in your workspace. Filter by actor, action, entity, or time range.
auditLog.forbidden: You need admin access to view the audit log.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Choose how Nebutra reaches you for each event type, on each delivery channel.

security.label: Security alerts
security.description: Sign-in alerts, password changes, two-factor changes.

billing.label: Billing
billing.description: Invoices, payment failures, and subscription changes.

invitation.label: Team invitations
invitation.description: Invites to join an organization, accepted or declined.

activity.label: Team activity
activity.description: Members joined, role changes, and other workspace activity.

updates.label: Product updates
updates.description: New features, changelog highlights, and release notes.

marketing.label: Marketing
marketing.description: Newsletter and occasional promotions. Opt-in only.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.description: Subscribe to events emitted by your workspace. We sign every payload with your endpoint's secret so you can verify authenticity.

create.heading: New endpoint
create.successTitle: Endpoint created — copy the signing secret now.
create.successWarning: This secret won't be shown again. Store it in your application's secret manager.

list.heading: Active endpoints
list.empty: No webhook endpoints yet. Create one above.

banner.title: Your privacy choices
banner.description: We use cookies to improve your experience, analyze site traffic, and personalize content. Choose which categories you want to allow.

necessary.label: Necessary
necessary.description: Required for the site to function. Cannot be disabled.

analytics.label: Analytics
analytics.description: Anonymous usage data so we can improve the product.

marketing.label: Marketing
marketing.description: Personalized advertising and retargeting on third-party platforms.

page.title: Notifications
page.description: All your notifications in one place.

errors.markRead: Failed to mark notification as read.
errors.bulkMarkRead: Some notifications could not be marked as read.

commandSurface.noAuth: Auth is not configured for the selected provider. Set the provider secrets to enable user sessions.

commandCenter.description: Start with one action: ask Sailor, inspect workspace signals, or route work into an automation surface.

recentSessions.title: Continue where you left off
recentSessions.subtitle: {count, plural, =0 {No sessions} =1 {1 recent session} other {# recent sessions}}

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.description: {done} of {total} complete · finish setup to unlock the full workspace

team.label: Invite a teammate
team.description: Bring at least one collaborator into your workspace.

api.label: Generate an API key
api.description: Programmatic access to your workspace endpoints.

integration.label: Connect an integration
integration.description: Stripe, Slack, webhooks, queues, and more.

ai.label: Open Sailor AI
ai.description: Try chat, data, or workflow mode.
